seed_problem: Assign frequencies to transmitters minimizing total interference conflicts under a channel budget; checker scores baseline_conflicts/achieved.
mutation: input: skin frequency-assignment as greenhouse zones and generalize to a weighted coupling graph with a hard color budget K in {2..5}, turning proper-coloring into weighted min-conflict K-coloring (weighted Max-K-Cut complement) where forced conflicts make the optimum intractable.
title: Greenhouse Climate-Program Assignment
strategies: do-nothing baseline: put every zone on program 1 (matches checker baseline, ratio ~0.1)
one-pass greedy: color zones in index order, giving each the program that adds the least conflict with already-colored coupled neighbors
local-search with multi-restart: greedy/random init then repeatedly move each zone to its least-conflict program until convergence, keeping the best of many seeded restarts
structure-aware moves: prioritize high-strength couplings first, or Kernighan-Lin-style swaps between program classes
